title: goodenia decurrens
intro: Goodenia decurrens, also known as the creeping goodenia, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in Indigenous Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Goodenia decurrens can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
